MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark Carton, Esq. 567-5517 for Plaintiff moving to enforce settlement agreement
Paul A. Conroy, Esq. of ALLMAN & NIELSEN 510/625-9500 for defendants FELZER FAMILY TRUST, ISADORE FELZER, SHIRLEE FELZER and SUSAN THEODORE opposing party

Counsel represented in open court that the checks were tendered on Friday, May 24th. Motion MOOT based on counsel's representation. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sara B. Allman, Esq. of ALLMAN & NIELSEN 510/625-9500 for defendants FELZER FAMILY TRUST, ISADORE FELZER, SHIRLEE FELZER and SUSAN THEODORE opposing party
Mark Carton, Esq. 567-5517 for Plaintiff WILLY CHANG moving to enforce settlement agreement
Edward D. Haas, Esq. of ROECA HAAS HAGER LLP 352-0980 personal counsel for Defendants also present in court

Argument presented. Counsel ordered to meet and confer. Matter recalled. Both parties represented in open court that they have reached a mutual understanding -- in exchange for rent check, $40,000. Mutual or non-mutual release issue and the issue of interest from April 1st or April 2nd are continued to May 28th for hearing. Also, Defendant's motion heretofore set for hearing on June 10th is ordered advanced to May 28, 2002 for hearing. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
